description:
Mediclaim/ Health insurance – What if you don’t pay the renewal premium on time

This video helps you to understand – if you forgot to pay health insurance premium on time, what option you –

Is there grace period in mediclaim

comments.text: Sir mai 6 saal seb se relience ka insurance le rahi hu iss saal 5 aug 2023 ko mera renewal due tha but i never received any email or massage from them and website pe show renewal notice not generated , sir what if i renew after grace peried with same company kya mera waiting period for PED '0' hoga ya i havebto again for 3 years

comments.text: Grace period me hi renewal karwa lein kyo ki uske baad insured hi health condition ke anusar premiums and waiting period company laga sakti hai.
comments.author: @InsuranceTechnical

comments.text: Sir agar insuranc company ke fault ke karan renew nahi ho pa raha ho toh kya kare
comments.author: @mayurirastogi6204

comments.text: Actually company ne renewal notice bheja hi nahin na koi call kiya Na koi text message aur na hi koi email tu humko pata hi nahi chala ki renewal ka time a gaya hai aur policy lapse ho gai to kya ismein company ki galti hai ki unhone renewal notice nahin bheja
comments.author: @ashwinsoni1766

comments.text: Hey  I am facing same issue . can u pls tell me have able to renew ur insurance
comments.author: @mayurirastogi6204

comments.text: Insurance company is not liable to send renewal notice to insured,  they send it as part of additional service. Matlab insurance company ne renewal notice send nahi keya aur renewal chut gaya to legally insurance company ki koi liability nahi banti hai.
comments.author: @InsuranceTechnical

comments.text: Thanks for your comment, life insurance me grace period premium payment mode ( quality , half-yearly, yearly ) pe nirbhar karta hai. Usually ye 15 days to 30 days hota hai. But life insurance me grace period me bhi coverage continue hoti hai.
